item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in ordinary execution mode, treated the three prior onboarding changes as unrelated operational items, and produced a direct step order for adding the device pickup entry. It did not fire triage, load Anti-Spiral/3L5S, or treat the count of changes as a repeated-repair brake signal."}
